scripts.install:analytics: cd apps/analytics && if command -v python3.11 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.11; elif command -v python3.12 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.12; else PY=python3; fi && $PY -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,analytics -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @mantra4change/server" "npm run dev -w @mantra4change/client" "npm run dev:analytics"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mantra4change/shared-types && npm run build -w @mantra4change/server && npm run build -w @mantra4change/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mantra4change/server && npm run test:python
